title: selaginella delicatula
intro: Selaginella delicatula, a type of spore-bearing vascular plant commonly known as a resurrection fern, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate the immune system and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Selaginella delicatula include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce anxiety and stress, and improve respiratory function. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or tincture, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and experience its health benefits.
